title: Vanilla Chill
description: If Minecraft had a DLC, this would be it.
body:
![banner_0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34f416947578efc0d6641136f40954bb73433afc_0.webp)
![banner_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1601602a95404cb5754eb36324d2554f076cf36b_0.webp)
### 📗 About:

Vanilla Chill is a new mod pack that allows you to experience a refined way of playing Minecraft, either alone or with your mates. It uses a select list of mods of all kinds so you can enjoy longer and more complete games, offering a development tree that allows you to maintain your progress in the game in a linear and orderly fashion, with different branches that ensure you'll never be left with nothing to do in a game until you complete the entire game.

Focused on a broader gaming experience than the basic Minecraft experience, but also taking into account the game's performance on computers with more limited resources, we aim to create a balance between efficiency and experience.

![banner_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1601602a95404cb5754eb36324d2554f076cf36b_0.webp)
